messages.content:
Read the file at: /Users/lsmola/Projects/MarkdownViewer/Tests/fixtures/agi-hive-mind-research.md

This file contains 1 review note marked as ```review blocks. Find each one, address the feedback, then remove the block once resolved.

Keep the rest of the document intact.

Done. The review note has been addressed and removed. Here's what was added:

- **Section 2.2** — added OpenAI Swarm and LangChain Agents to the Related Work table
- **Section 4.1** — added benchmark rows for OpenAI Swarm (3) and LangChain (3)
- **Section 4.4** (new) — "Prototype Deployment Latency" table with p50/p95/p99 percentiles and throughput for all configurations, plus a note explaining the latency characteristics
